context: The Foundation (Chunks 1-3) is complete. Antigravity has renamed event namespaces, fixed high-level Keystatic multi-tenancy, and implemented the BaseLayout title composition logic. Your task is to perform the wide-scale cleanup sweep.
scope_of_work: CHUNK 4: Site-wide Page Title Sweep (Replace title prop with pageTitle on all pages)
CHUNK 5: Atomic Design — BaseLayout as Data Hub (De-fetch AnnouncementBar & SideDrawer)
CHUNK 6: Atomic Design — Navbar as Logo Provider (De-fetch Logo)
CHUNK 7: Atomic Design — Footer as Social Provider (De-fetch SocialLinks)
execution_rules: Execute ONLY Chunks 4, 5, 6, and 7 in this session.
Verify dev server stability after EVERY single commit.
Commit each chunk individually with a descriptive message.
Follow the architectural decisions in Section 3 of the plan strictly.
Do NOT attempt the FAQ or Navigation migrations (Chunks 10-11) yet.
expected_outcome: A consistent site-wide metadata title system and 4 key components converted to pure atomic design via prop-driving.
